svg.title: Phase 17 — Deploy to Railway
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the 9 steps to deploy a TanStack Start app to Railway

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why do I need to regenerate the lockfile before deploying to Railway?')
g.text: Remove node_modules + package-lock.json, then npm install

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the railway preset do in TanStack Start?')
sendPrompt('What does tanstack.config.ts do for Railway deployment?')
sendPrompt('Why do I need nixpacks.toml for Railway and what does each phase do?')
g.text: install → build → start phases, avoids npm ci failures

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I create a new Railway project from GitHub?')
g.text: Step 4 — Push to GitHub + create project
git push → New Project → Deploy from GitHub repo

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What environment variables do I need to add to Railway?')
sendPrompt('How do I generate a public domain on Railway?')
sendPrompt('Why do I need both BETTER_AUTH_URL and VITE_BETTER_AUTH_URL?')
sendPrompt('How do I update auth-client.ts to use VITE_BETTER_AUTH_URL?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the final git push to Railway?')
